notes: Android host should reject envelopes where version != 1.
Payloads must be JSON-serializable before sending to apps/web.
playback.open may include optional fields: sourceUrl, artworkUrl, logoUrl, resumePositionMs, fallbackWebUrl, settings, tracks, navigationContext.
playback.result may include optional fields: fallbackTriggered, failureDomain, failureDetail, settingsDiagnostics, exitReason, navigationContext.
When host loop guard blocks native launch, playback.result should use failureDetail=loop_guard_skip with fallbackTriggered=true.
back.pressed payload includes requestId for deterministic back acknowledgement.
back.handled command acknowledges a specific back requestId with handled boolean.
